message:
feat(native): enable native shapes for native binary and fix TSC factory interception

- Register native_shapes_polyfill in native_main_embed.zig to expose
  __edgebox_register_node to JavaScript
- Fix jsvalueToAddr to handle both NaN-boxed (WASM) and native struct
  modes using comptime detection
- Add TypeScript bundle patching in runtime.zig to export ts namespace
  to globalThis and copy wrapped createSourceFile back to local variable
- Add debug logging in tsc.js for createSourceFile calls and node counts
- Disable output buffering and increase stack size for TSC compatibility
